markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Novak Djokovic wins set 4 in the Felix Auger-Aliassime vs Novak Djokovic professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Quarterfinal, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Felix Auger-Aliassime vs Novak Djokovic professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Quarterfinal. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.
markets.title: Will Novak Djokovic win set 4 in the Felix Auger-Aliassime vs Novak Djokovic match

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Cardinals wins by more than 4.5 runs in the Milwaukee vs St. Louis professional baseball game 1 of the double header originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026 at 2:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Cardinals wins by over 4.5 runs?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Ricardo Rodriguez records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Colombia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Switzerland vs Colombia professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 7, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Ricardo Rodriguez: 1+ assists?
